name: CSEC Plan Amortization Extension

eligibility.description: CSEC plans where failure to extend would result in substantial risk to plan continuation or benefit levels; requires Secretary approval.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows Cooperative and Small Employer Charity (CSEC) plans to request a 10-year extension on the amortization of unfunded liabilities to reduce immediate contribution requirements.
